title: Rich Crisp Midnight Red Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A rich and crisp Mediterranean dish featuring red potatoes, cooked under high pressure for a mediterranean twist on a classic side dish.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp fresh herbs (thyme, rosemary or oregano), finely chopped

instructions: Place red potatoes in a pressure cooker and add enough water to cover. Pressure cook for 8 minutes on high pressure.
Drain the cooked potatoes, reserving some cooking liquid if needed.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions, garlic, bell peppers, and herbs. Sauté until vegetables are tender.
Add nutritional yeast to the skillet with salt and pepper. Stir well to combine flavors.
Pour in reserved cooking water from potatoes into the skillet. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for a few minutes.
Stir in lemon juice and cook for another 2-3 minutes until potatoes are coated evenly.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs if desired.
